title: When Forgiveness Was a Trap - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on a podcast episode exploring the historical and philosophical dimensions of forgiveness. The title suggests an examination of how forgiveness functioned as a mechanism or constraint in particular social or historical contexts.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer on the historical and philosophical dimensions of forgiveness. The conversation examines how forgiveness operated as a mechanism or constraint within particular social and historical contexts, as the title's framing of forgiveness "as a trap" indicates. The episode sits outside the channel's usual technical focus, drawing instead on Palmer's expertise to interrogate how a moral concept can function as a tool of control.
